initial_diagnostics.reason: Runner answers bounded diagnostic questions or records controlled technical_unavailable state.

tutor_concept_question.reason: Runner asks a concept explanation question through the rendered UI.

debugging_student_message.reason: Runner asks a debugging-style Python SyntaxError question through the rendered UI.

locked_exercise_project_probes.reason: Runner probes locked exercise and project APIs before prerequisites are met.

data_export_backup.reason: Runner checks export and encrypted backup API behavior.

refresh_recovery.reason: Runner reloads the page and verifies session recovery.

sse_recovery.reason: Runner observes local SSE lifecycle failures through policy-governed request failure classification.

desktop_viewport.reason: Runner starts with a desktop browser viewport.

mobile_viewport.reason: Runner switches to a mobile viewport and verifies core controls.

slow_network_behavior.reason: Bounded local throttling scenario is planned; current runner records this explicitly instead of implying execution.

rate_limit_behavior.reason: Bounded local rate-limit scenario is planned; existing API unit tests cover rate-limit enforcement.

partial_diagnostic_state.reason: Strict progress-state scenario enables a deterministic local partial diagnostic probe.

completed_diagnostic_state.reason: Strict progress-state or completed-path scenarios enable deterministic completed diagnostic evidence.

exercise_attempted_state.reason: Strict progress-state or completed-path scenarios enable deterministic exercise-attempted evidence.

project_attempted_state.reason: Strict progress-state or completed-path scenarios enable deterministic project-attempted evidence.

long_learner_message.reason: Strict adversarial input scenario sends a bounded long learner message through the rendered UI.

prompt_injection_like_message.reason: Strict adversarial input scenario treats prompt-injection-like text as untrusted learner evidence.

pasted_code_error_text.reason: Strict adversarial input scenario sends pasted code and error text through the rendered UI.

delayed_model_response.reason: Strict model anomaly scenario records bounded local delayed-response evidence.

empty_malformed_model_response.reason: Strict model anomaly scenario records empty or malformed model-output handling evidence.

provider_unavailable_model.reason: Strict model anomaly scenario records controlled provider-unavailable tutor behavior.

back_reload_recovery.reason: Strict recovery scenario exercises same-origin back or reload recovery.

controlled_backend_failure.reason: Strict recovery scenario records an allowlisted controlled backend failure.

stale_local_data.reason: Strict recovery scenario records stale local data handling evidence.

malformed_local_data.reason: Strict recovery scenario records malformed local data handling evidence.

backup_restore_behavior.reason: Strict recovery scenario records backup or restore path evidence.

forbidden_term_redaction.reason: Strict artifact-oracle scenario verifies forbidden-term redaction.

screenshot_safety_skip.reason: Strict artifact-oracle scenario writes a sanitized screenshot skip note.

sanitized_terminal_errors.reason: Strict artifact-oracle scenario verifies terminal-facing error sanitization.

unexpected_http_failure_oracle.reason: Strict artifact-oracle scenario validates unexpected HTTP failure classification.

console_error_oracle.reason: Strict artifact-oracle scenario validates console error classification.

state_contradiction_oracle.reason: Strict artifact-oracle scenario validates state contradiction classification.

empty_loading_page_oracle.reason: Strict artifact-oracle scenario validates empty or loading page classification.

fixtureScenarios.name: completed_paths
fixtureScenarios.description: Optional sanitized fixture path for completed diagnostic plus exercise/project states; disabled unless STUDENT_LOOP_FIXTURE_SCENARIO=completed_paths.
